description_long: This object is a compact DJ controller or audio mixing console, featuring a sleek, rectangular body with a brushed metallic finish. The top surface is dominated by two large, circular black jog wheels, surrounded by an array of colorful buttons, knobs, and sliders in green, yellow, red, and blue. The central section houses several vertical sliders and rotary knobs, likely for volume and mixing control, as well as a few square and rectangular buttons for cueing and playback. The edges are lined with additional buttons and controls, providing a tactile and interactive interface for audio manipulation. The overall design is modern and functional, with a layout optimized for quick access to all controls. This device is typically used in urban environments for music mixing at events, clubs, or street performances.
description: A modern DJ controller with two large black jog wheels, surrounded by colorful buttons, knobs, and sliders on a brushed metallic surface. Designed for audio mixing and music control in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both jog wheels, central sliders, and a full array of colorful buttons and knobs.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the depth of the jog wheels and the raised control knobs at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the central sliders and symmetrical layout of buttons and controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle emphasizing the jog wheels and the distribution of buttons along the edge.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary knobs, sliders, jog wheels
